tracks.rawText: 2:47Fire Krystal Smokev5.5French house gloss with filtered disco sample chops, four-on-the-floor kick, sidechained house bass, and 124 BPM club pulse, Dark trap layers add 808 sub-bass, pitched snare claps, sparse triplet hi-hat rolls, minor-key synth stabs, vinyl crackle, and wide stereo delayPublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 3:38Piso de Nochev5.5French house / dance-pop with four-on-the-floor kick, crunchy filtered disco guitar chops, rubbery bass, and swung claps; verse rides a lean drum-bass pulse with chopped vocal stabs, pre-chorus opens with rising filter sweeps and handclap lifts, chorus hits with bright string stabs and a singback hook, bridge drops to kick, bass, and a whispered topline before the final lift, Double-tracked lead, playful ad-lib throws, gang vocal hook repeats, glossy wide mix with vinyl crackle and reverse sweeps into each drop, disco, electronic1PublishRemix
tracks.title: Piso de Noche

tracks.rawText: 3:32Huéhuetl Resonancev5.5Psytrance at 145 BPM with driving kick, rolling offbeat bass, and stark negative space between phrases, Prehispanic Mexican colors from huéhuetl drum hits, teponaztli wood slaps, ayoyote rattles, conch horn bursts, and serpent-like flute motifs, Psychedelic arps, resonant filter sweeps, gated delays, and dry, punchy percussion2PublishRemix
